description: Street gang based in downtown Los Angeles, founded by Filipino and Mexican youths in the 1920s-1930s. Involved in murders, assaults, burglaries, drug and gun trafficking. Colors are blue and black. Allies include Sureños and Mexican Mafia; rivals include Norteños and 18th Street gang.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Central Los Angeles, Philippines(MBLS)Started 1993 at (Dapitan St. Metro Manila [North Side]Manila Boy Locos[MBLS]) 1995 at (South Side [PLS] Pinoy Locos)
country_links.context: The Temple Street gang has territory in the Philippines, specifically in Metro Manila.
